# Campus Connect Analytics

> Student growth intelligence platform that helps educational institutions track engagement, identify skill gaps, and measure career readiness through beautiful analytics.

Campus Connect Analytics turns student activities, events, certifications, workshops, and internships into actionable growth insights for administrators, faculty, and student coordinators.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and live demo entry point.
- [Sign in](/auth): Access the live demo workspace with any credentials.
